decision.summary: No live position needs management; open the weekly BTC 74k reach market on the long side.
decision.rationale: The latest 2026-04-08 transcript and recent summaries keep Beecthor macro-bearish overall but shift the immediate thesis to a final corrective push toward 74k before looking for renewed downside, with invalidation only above 76k. Binance confirms that short-term execution reality is bullish right now at 71753.96 with +5.038% over 24h and a 72857 high. The stale account_state positions are not present in live Polymarket positions, so there is no actionable existing position to manage; among current markets, the nearest upside 73k April 8 line is too discounted at 15.5%, so the weekly 74k April 6-12 Yes market at 42.0% is the cleanest nearest-reasonable, conservative expression of the active thesis.
